subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in South Asia | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-8029
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in South Asia. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Ada Lovelace as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-8029. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: review, delivery.
